transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Meridian Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to refill my blood pressure medication, lisinopril. I think it's ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, let me pull that up. I see a prescription on file for Sarah Kensington under Dr. Amelia Torres, who specializes in pediatric dermatology.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Um, that's not right. Dr. Torres is my cardiologist, not a pediatric dermatologist.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're right, apologies, let me re-check that record. Okay, I've got the correct file now, Dr. Torres, cardiology, and your lisinopril 10 milligram prescription is active.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, thank you. Can you send the refill to my usual pharmacy?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, I have Riverbend Pharmacy on file. I'll send the refill request there now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, how long should that take?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Typically one to two business days. You'll get a text when it's ready for pickup.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sounds good, thanks for fixing that mix-up.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, happy to help. Is there anything else you need today?
